terms.definition: Pattern used here: few-shot estimation examples and mode-specific system instructions are injected into the LLM prompt; the client supplies structured project context as the user message.
One of basic, standard, professional, or expert_review; selected from request context and eligibility rules in app/services/estimation_engine.py.
LLMPipeline in app/guardrails/llm_pipeline.py: input guardrails, optional semantic cache lookup, structured LLM completion, output semantic checks.
Ordered LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic via LiteLLM) with optional static fallback when all providers fail, configured by LLM_PROVIDERS.
Namespaced cache partition derived from mode, prompt versions, and input fingerprint for vector similarity lookup in Redis.
External global CLI that validates and visualizes docs/architext/data/*.json; viewer code is not vendored in this repository.
